message:
perf(pager,core,vdbe): commit-and-retain for in-memory pagers, prepared DML fast-lane profiling, comprehensive hot-path counters

Pager commit-and-retain (pager.rs + traits.rs):
- New commit_and_retain() for :memory: databases that commits pending
  writes WITHOUT releasing writer state, allowing consecutive DML to
  skip the full begin/commit cycle.

Prepared DML fast-lane profiling (connection.rs):
- 13 new hot-path counters: prepared_cache_hits/misses, insert/update/
  delete fast_lane vs instrumented_lane, 6 fallback-reason counters.

VDBE engine (engine.rs): Additional write-path instrumentation.
E2E (realdb_e2e.rs + perf_runner.rs): Profile structures updated.
MVCC (begin_concurrent.rs): Handle management refinements.
.gitignore: Added .beads_snapshot_*/ and .beads/*.pre_* patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -221,6 +221,8 @@ tmp_rch_probe/
 # Beads ephemeral artifacts (recovery, backup, bad/rebuild snapshots)
 .beads/.br_recovery/
 .beads_recovery_*/
+.beads_snapshot_*/
+.beads/*.pre_*
 .beads/*.backup.*
 .beads/*.bad_*
 .beads/*.backup_*

 }

+    pub prepared_update_delete_fallback_without_rowid: u64,
+    pub prepared_update_delete_fallback_live_vtab: u64,
+    pub prepared_update_delete_fallback_trigger: u64,

+    pub prepared_table_dml_affected_only_runs: u64,

     pub autoincrement_sequence_scan_refreshes: u64,
 }
